notes: v0.16.77 — Mini-boss redesign LIVE in Rift. Also restores normal game (v0.16.76 was a lab-only build that shipped by mistake). Picked designs ported to real Rift mini-boss slots: (1) TURRET CORE → PRISM CORE — rotating 4-face prism, every face fires its own weapon (MG / LASER / SHOT / RING-PULSE), active face is 2× buffed, centre kick shockwave on downbeat. (2) SPLITTER → MITOSIS — organic pulsing cell that spawns chasing clones every 2 beats (2-shot fan each), boss radial spread on every downbeat, single 50% HP split spawns a big wave + boss panic ring. (3) SWARM QUEEN → HIVE MOTHER — hex body INVULNERABLE while any drone is alive, DOUBLE RING 6+3 drones (inner faster, outer tougher), clear all → 4 s exposed window with radial panic-fire → drones respawn. (4) RAIL SENTINEL kept with its 4 attack patterns (SWEEP / CROSS / WHEEL / ZIGZAG). DIFFICULTY CURVE WIDENED: HP × [0.55 / 1.0 / 1.55 / 2.30], ATK × [0.45 / 1.0 / 1.55 / 2.20] — EASY actually feels EASY, BRUTAL is a wall. Mini-boss clears no longer write into the BOSS RUSH leaderboard — only true Boss Rush and the rift BOSS-finale count. Windows only.
